Featured Eclipses in Coming Years

    Find all solar and lunar eclipses worldwide. When is the next eclipse in your city?

    Eclipses in 2026
    Mar 2–3
    Lunar Eclipse (Total)East in Europe, Asia, Australia, North America, South America, Pacific, Atlantic, Indian Ocean, Arctic, Antarctica
    Aug 12
    Solar Eclipse (Total)Europe, North in Asia, North/West Africa, Much of North America, Pacific, Atlantic, Arctic
    Aug 27–28
    Lunar Eclipse (Partial)Europe, West in Asia, Africa, North America, South America, Pacific, Atlantic, Indian Ocean, Antarctica
    Eclipses in 2027
    Feb 6
    Solar Eclipse (Annular)Much of Africa, South America, Pacific, Atlantic, Antarctica
    Feb 20–21
    Lunar Eclipse (Penumbral)Europe, Asia, North/West Australia, Africa, Much of North America, South America, Pacific, Atlantic, Indian Ocean, Arctic, Antarctica
    Jul 18–19
    Lunar Eclipse (Almost)
    Aug 2
    Solar Eclipse (Total)Europe, South/West Asia, Africa, East in North America, Atlantic, Indian Ocean
    Aug 16–17
    Lunar Eclipse (Penumbral)West in Europe, North in Asia, Much of Australia, North/West Africa, North America, South America, Pacific, Atlantic, Antarctica
    Eclipses in 2028
    Jan 11–12
    Lunar Eclipse (Partial)Europe, North/West Asia, Africa, North America, South America, Pacific, Atlantic, Indian Ocean, Arctic
    Jan 26
    Solar Eclipse (Annular)South/West Europe, North/West Africa, South/East North America, South America, Pacific, Atlantic
    Jul 6–7
    Lunar Eclipse (Partial)Europe, Asia, Australia, Africa, South/East South America, Pacific, Atlantic, Indian Ocean, Antarctica
    Jul 22
    Solar Eclipse (Total)South in Asia, Australia, Pacific, Indian Ocean, Antarctica
    Dec 31–Jan 1
    Lunar Eclipse (Total)Europe, Asia, Australia, Africa, North/West North America, Pacific, Atlantic, Indian Ocean, Arctic
    Eclipses in 2029
    Jan 14
    Solar Eclipse (Partial)North America, Pacific, Atlantic
    Jun 12
    Solar Eclipse (Partial)Much of Europe, North in Asia, North/West North America, Pacific, Arctic
    Jun 25–26
    Lunar Eclipse (Total)Europe, West in Asia, Africa, North America, South America, Pacific, Atlantic, Indian Ocean, Antarctica
    Jul 11
    Solar Eclipse (Partial)South in South America, Pacific, Atlantic
    Dec 5
    Solar Eclipse (Partial)South in South America, Pacific, Atlantic, Indian Ocean, Antarctica
    Dec 20–21
    Lunar Eclipse (Total)Europe, Asia, North/West Australia, Africa, North America, South America, Pacific, Atlantic, Indian Ocean, Arctic
    Eclipses in 2030
    Jun 1
    Solar Eclipse (Annular)Europe, Asia, Much of Africa, North/West North America, Pacific, Atlantic, Arctic
    Jun 15–16
    Lunar Eclipse (Partial)Europe, Asia, Australia, Africa, South/East South America, Pacific, Atlantic, Indian Ocean, Antarctica
    Nov 25
    Solar Eclipse (Total)South in Asia, Australia, South/East Africa, Pacific, Atlantic, Indian Ocean, Antarctica
    Dec 9–10
    Lunar Eclipse (Penumbral)Europe, Asia, North/West Australia, Africa, North America, South America, Pacific, Atlantic, Indian Ocean, Arctic

    May 6–7
    Lunar Eclipse (Penumbral)Europe, West in Asia, Africa, North America, South America, Pacific, Atlantic, Indian Ocean, Antarctica
    May 21
    Solar Eclipse (Annular)Much of Asia, North/West Australia, South/East Africa, Pacific, Atlantic, Indian Ocean
    Jun 5
    Lunar Eclipse (Penumbral)Much of Asia, Australia, South/West North America, South/West South America, Pacific, Atlantic, Indian Ocean, Antarctica
    Oct 29–30
    Lunar Eclipse (Penumbral)Much of Europe, North/East Asia, Much of Australia, North/West Africa, North America, South America, Pacific, Atlantic, Arctic, Antarctica
    Nov 14
    Solar Eclipse (Total)Much of North America, North/West South America, Pacific, Atlantic

    Apr 25–26
    Lunar Eclipse (Total)South/East Europe, Asia, Australia, Much of Africa, Much of North America, Pacific, Atlantic, Indian Ocean, Antarctica

    Oct 18–19

    Nov 3

    Nov 13

    Solar Eclipse (Total)West in Europe, North in Asia, North America, Pacific, Atlantic, Arctic
